data.title: RED: Write failing tests for _compute_max_agents() 3-tier verdict logic
data.description:
## Description

Write a new test file exercising the _compute_max_agents() function that will be extracted in agent-batch-lifecycle.sh. Tests source the script and call the function directly with mock check-usage.sh via PATH override and WORKFLOW_CONFIG injection.

### Files to create
- tests/scripts/test-lifecycle-max-agents.sh

### Test cases (behavioral — source function, call it, assert output)
- test_verdict_unlimited: mock check-usage.sh exits 0, no config cap → output "unlimited"
- test_verdict_throttled: mock check-usage.sh exits 1 → output "1"
- test_verdict_paused: mock check-usage.sh exits 2 → output "0"
- test_config_cap_applied: mock exits 0 (unlimited), config orchestration.max_agents=3 → output "3"
- test_config_cap_lower_than_throttle: mock exits 1 (throttle=1), config max_agents=5 → output "1" (min wins)
- test_config_cap_with_paused: mock exits 2 (paused=0), config max_agents=3 → output "0" (paused always wins)
- test_no_credentials_fallback: mock check-usage.sh exits 0 with USAGE_SOURCE: no-credentials → output per config or "unlimited"
- test_context_check_exit11: context-check returns exit 11 → MAX_AGENTS: 1

### TDD requirement
All tests MUST fail because _compute_max_agents() does not exist yet.

### Test approach
Each test creates a mock check-usage.sh script in a temp directory, prepends that to PATH, sources agent-batch-lifecycle.sh, calls _compute_max_agents(), and asserts the output string.

## File Impact
- tests/scripts/test-lifecycle-max-agents.sh (create)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] tests/scripts/test-lifecycle-max-agents.sh exists and is executable
  Verify: test -x $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-lifecycle-max-agents.sh
- [ ] Test file contains at least 7 test functions
  Verify: grep -c "_test_\|test_" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-lifecycle-max-agents.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 7)}'
- [ ] Tests fail (RED) because _compute_max_agents function does not exist
  Verify: ! bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-lifecycle-max-agents.sh 2>/dev/null
- [ ] All other existing tests still pass
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
